completedItems: Replaced the hard-coded shared DEV_AUTH_ID backend scope with Convex auth identity scoping and an anonymous client session fallback, so chat data is no longer globally shared by every caller.
Updated chat queries/mutations to accept and validate clientSessionId, resolve a scoped user, and keep reads/writes bounded to that user/session.
Extended message metadata in the Convex schema for source, automated attribution, reply/context windows, grouped message ids, and refresh reasons.
Added `chatContext.ts` with configurable bounded recent-window, reply-surrounding-window, and consecutive-user grouping helpers.
Wired `sendMessage` through the context builder and stored context metadata on persisted messages.
Added an explicit `requestContextRefresh` mutation that writes the automated non-assistant refresh status message without triggering placeholder reply flow.
Updated the Svelte chat route to pass a stable per-browser client session id to Convex functions and allow reply targeting for non-system messages.
unfinishedItems: Full production auth provider integration is still future work; current implementation uses Convex auth when present and a local anonymous session fallback for unauthenticated development/manual testing.
No live browser/manual Convex seed/send flow was run in this pass.

commandsExecuted.command: cd app && npx prettier --write src/convex/chat.ts src/convex/chatContext.ts src/convex/schema.ts src/routes/chat/+page.svelte

commandResults.output: Generated server code and TypeScript bindings successfully.
Prettier passed and ESLint exited 0; generated Convex files still emit four unused eslint-disable warnings.
Modified Convex generated api.d.ts, app/src/convex/chat.ts, app/src/convex/schema.ts, app/src/routes/chat/+page.svelte; added app/src/convex/chatContext.ts; pre-existing .DS_Store remains modified.

issuesDiscovered: Development wipe/seed tools now require a dev Convex deployment or CHAT_DEV_TOOLS_ENABLED=true, so local environments without those server env settings will need that configured for manual seed/clear testing.
Existing generated Convex lint warnings remain non-blocking.

validationAssertionsTouched.notes: Scoped Convex send/list paths persist and reload chat messages.
Message listing uses byUserSession index ordered ascending by timestamp.
Schema now models reply target, automated/source attribution, context windows, grouped ids, and refresh reason.
Backend resolves scope from Convex auth identity or a required anonymous session id and validates reply targets remain inside the current user/session.
Reads use withIndex plus bounded take limits.
Context builder includes newest trigger plus bounded recent window.
Context builder includes reply target surroundings plus recent tail.
Context windows are capped by centralized limits rather than full history.
Window sizes are centralized in contextWindowConfig.
requestContextRefresh writes the required automated status text.
Refresh messages use role system, source automated_context_refresh, and isAutomated true.
requestContextRefresh provides the callable future-agent path.
Refresh mutation inserts only the system message and does not call placeholder send flow.
